outcome_text: Test sets, metrics, and details about the tools used during test, evaluation, verification, and validation (TEVV) are documented.
scoring_text: Skill in AI TEVV documentation, including recording test set compositions and selection criteria, documenting metrics and measurement tools, and maintaining comprehensive records of testing, evaluation, verification, and validation activities and their results.
_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in AI TEVV documentation, including recording test set compositions and selection criteria, documenting metrics and measurement tools, and maintaining comprehensive records of testing, evaluation, verification, and validation activities and their results.
reference_document_element_description: Produce AI system documentation (model cards, evaluation reports) meeting the standards required for governance review, regulatory submission, or external audit.
comments: NIST AI RMF MS-2.1 (MEASURE) superset of WIDAI RM domain. RM-T-004 is the strongest match (STS: 0.566, cosine: 0.656). Secondary: RM-S-005 (RM, cosine: 0.639), RM-T-003 (RM, cosine: 0.635).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression. Primary method for all elements. Scores the competency_implication text (workforce competency interpretation of the risk management outcome) against WIDAI KSA statements.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.566). Shared vocabulary: [ai, documentation, evaluation]. NIST AI RMF competency implication terms [activities, compositions, comprehensive, criteria, documenting, maintaining] vs WIDAI terms [audit, cards, external, governance, meeting, model] define the semantic distance.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.863 (P=0.860, R=0.867). Balanced P/R — the 32-word competency implication and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference classification. NLI entailment is systematically low for competency→competency pairs because NLI measures strict logical implication, not semantic relatedness. Primary diagnostic value is in detecting contradiction.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). Standard result for cross-framework competency mapping — the NIST AI RMF element and WIDAI KSA describe overlapping competencies without strict logical implication.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.656 > STS 0.566 (gap +0.090). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ai, documentation, evaluation] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.7%. Shared tokens: [ai, documentation, evaluation]. NIST AI RMF-only: [activities, compositions, comprehensive, criteria, documenting, maintaining]. WIDAI-only: [audit, cards, external, governance, meeting, model].
